privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: The developer fully understands the importance of your personal information and will make every effort to ensure its security and reliability. In accordance with laws, regulations, and national standards, the following Privacy Policy for "AkaChat" is established:

informationCollection.title: Information Collection
informationCollection.description: The "AkaChat" app does not collect any private information from users' phones, such as phone numbers, contacts, SMS, location, etc. The developer's original intention is to develop a useful team messaging tool, and there will be no third-party advertisements within the app (occasionally, the developer's own products may be promoted), so you don't have to worry about third-party advertising service providers stealing your phone's privacy.

appFunctionality.title: App Functionality
appFunctionality.description: All functions within the "AkaChat" app are designed to provide secure team messaging capabilities with enterprise-grade security features.

yourConsent.title: Your Consent
yourConsent.description: Please read and fully understand the content of this Privacy Policy before using our products or services. By using our products or services, you indicate that you have fully understood and agree to this policy.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: If the app has been helpful to you, please give the "AkaChat" app a good review. This will encourage the developer to provide higher-quality app content.

privacy.closing: Finally, wish you a pleasant experience using it.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.description: By accessing and using AkaChat ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.

descriptionOfService.title: 2. Description of Service
descriptionOfService.description: AkaChat is a team messaging platform that provides messaging, file sharing, and channel organization tools. The service is provided "as is" and we reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time.

userAccounts.title: 3. User Accounts
userAccounts.description: To use our service, you must:
requirements: Provide accurate and complete registration information
Maintain the security of your account credentials
Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use

contactInformation.title: 4. Contact Information
contactInformation.description: If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:
contactInformation.address: Address: Landmark Pluit, Blok E7, Pluit, Penjaringan, North Jakarta City, Jakarta
